data.title: STANDEX REPORTS FISCAL THIRD QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: During the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, there was an 8.1% year-over-year increase in sales, amounting to $224.6 million. Sales of new products experienced a growth of approximately 40%, and sales in fast-growing markets accounted for over 30% of total sales in the same period. Organically, sales saw a 6.5% year-over-year growth, with the electronics sector specifically increasing by 6.8%. The book-to-bill ratio stood at 1.05 during this quarter.

data.title: FiEE, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Unaudited Financial Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, FiEE, Inc., a technology company based in Osaka, Japan, reported a revenue of $2.1 million with a strong gross margin of 70.4%. This positive financial performance supported a profit turnaround for the company. FiEE, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FIEE, focuses on integrating IoT, connectivity, and AI technologies to transform brand experiences.

data.title: Crocs, Inc. Publishes 2025 Comfort Report Detailing Updates on Purpose & Sustainability
data.description: In the latest report, it is emphasized how various programs converge to propel advancement in enterprise and brand objectives related to Inclusivity, Circularity, Climate, and Community. The report indicates that Crocs, Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX), a prominent innovator in casual footwear, is focusing on these areas for progress. The report was released on April 30, 2026, in Broomfield, Colorado.

data.title: Lummus Technology Selected for Major Ethanol-to-Jet SAF Project in India
data.description: The inaugural integration of an ethanol-to-jet pathway has been successfully achieved through a collaboration between Lummus Technology and India-based GPS Renewables. This marks a significant step towards sustainable aviation fuel production. The announcement was made on April 30, 2026, in Houston. Lummus Technology, a prominent global provider of energy technology solutions, disclosed the partnership with GPS Renewables. This initiative demonstrates a pioneering effort in the industry.

data.title: S&P Global to Present at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference on May 5, 2026
data.description: On May 5, 2026, Martina Cheung, the President and CEO of S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI), will take part in the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Franchise Conference in London, UK. The session will be webcasted for viewers.

data.title: PROCEPT BioRobotics® to Attend Three Upcoming Investor Conferences in May & June
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in San Jose, California, PROCEPT BioRobotics (Nasdaq: PRCT), a leading surgical robotics firm specializing in innovative urology solutions for improved patient care, disclosed plans for its participation in three investor conferences scheduled for May and June. The Company's management is set to present at these events, demonstrating its dedication to engaging with the investment community.

data.title: FTC Solar to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Tuesday, May 5, 2026
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on April 30, 2026, FTC Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FTCI), a prominent solar tracker systems, software, and engineering services provider, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 prior to the market opening on Tuesday, May 5, 2026.

data.title: Ardelyx announces Q1 2026 financial results and business update.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States saw a slight increase to 4.4% in the month of August. This change represents an increase of 0.2% from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 235,000 jobs during the same period. Despite this slight rise in unemployment, the job market continues to show signs of recovery following the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. The increase in jobs was mainly seen in sectors such as professional and business services, transportation, and warehousing. Overall, the labor market is steadily improving, albeit at a slower pace than earlier in the year.

data.title: Pacira BioSciences Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: The company reported total revenue of $177 million for the quarter, marking a 5% increase from the previous quarter in 2025. The growth was mainly fueled by a strong performance in the commercial portfolio, with EXPAREL volume experiencing a 7% growth. Additionally, the enrollment process for the Phase 3 registrational study of ZILRETTA in shoulder osteoarthritis pain has been successfully completed. The study is progressing as planned and is expected to provide topline results by the end of the year.

data.title: Monolithic Power Systems Reports First Quarter Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (MPS), headquartered in Schaffhausen, Switzerland, released its financial results on April 30, 2026, after the market closed. The company will be conducting a question-and-answer webinar at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time / 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. To participate, individuals can visit the Investor Relations section of the MPS website at www.monolithicpower.com.

data.title: Alignment Healthcare Delivers Strong First Quarter 2026 Results, Demonstrating Disciplined Growth and Margin Expansion
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Alignment Healthcare, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALHC), based in Orange, California, released its financial outcomes for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: NMI Holdings, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: NMI Holdings, Inc. announced a net income of $99.3 million, or $1.28 per diluted share, for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. This is a slight increase from the $94.2 million, or $1.20 per diluted share, reported in the previous quarter ending December 31, 2025. However, it is slightly lower than the $102.6 million, or $1.28 per diluted share, recorded in the first quarter of 2025. The adjusted net income for the quarter was reported at $99.4 million, or $1.28 per diluted share, a rise from the $93.8 million, or $1.20 per diluted share, in the previous quarter and a slight decrease from the $102.5 million, or $1.28 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2025.
